description: Rename the core 'Idea' entity to 'Project' across the entire codebase — database, backend models, API routes, frontend code, and all user-facing text. This is a comprehensive refactoring that touches every layer of the stack. The project_type column is added here but the type selection UI comes in M19.

userStories.title: [Backend] Rename database tables and models from Idea to Project
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all database tables and backend models renamed from 'idea' to 'project' so that the codebase reflects the new product terminology and prepares for the project types feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration created to rename 'ideas' table to 'projects'
Migration created to rename 'idea_collaborators' table to 'project_collaborators'

Migration created to rename all 'idea_id' foreign key columns to 'project_id' in: chat_messages, requirements_document_drafts, requirements_document_versions, review_assignments, review_timeline_entries, collaboration_invitations, chat_context_summaries

Migration created to add 'project_type' column to projects table (varchar(20), NOT NULL, CHECK constraint for 'software'/'non_software'). Note: This column is added now but not yet populated or used — M19 will add type selection UI.
Migration adds index on projects.project_type column
Django app 'ideas' renamed to 'projects' in services/core/apps/ (update app name in apps.py, INSTALLED_APPS in settings)
Django app 'ideas' renamed to 'projects' in services/gateway/apps/ (update app name in apps.py, INSTALLED_APPS in settings)
Core models.py: Idea class renamed to Project, IdeaCollaborator renamed to ProjectCollaborator
Gateway models.py: Idea class renamed to Project, IdeaCollaborator renamed to ProjectCollaborator (mirror models)
All model method names and docstrings updated (e.g., 'idea.title' still valid as 'project.title')
All ForeignKey related_name updated: 'idea' -> 'project', 'collaborators' stays same
proto/core.proto: Idea message renamed to Project, IdeaCollaborator to ProjectCollaborator, all idea_id fields renamed to project_id
proto/common.proto: Idea message renamed to Project, idea_id fields renamed to project_id
proto/gateway.proto: Idea message renamed to Project, idea_id fields renamed to project_id
proto/ai.proto: idea_id fields renamed to project_id
proto/pdf.proto: idea_id fields renamed to project_id
All proto files regenerated (run scripts/codegen.sh or equivalent protoc commands)
All gRPC servicers updated to use Project instead of Idea in method signatures
All gRPC clients updated to use Project instead of Idea
WebSocket consumer class renamed: IdeaConsumer -> ProjectConsumer
WebSocket channel groups renamed: 'idea_{id}' -> 'project_{id}'
RabbitMQ event types renamed: 'idea.*' -> 'project.*' (e.g., 'idea.created' -> 'project.created')
Notification templates updated: all 'idea' references -> 'project'
All test files updated to use Project instead of Idea
Typecheck passes (mypy services/)
Ruff check passes (ruff check services/)
Docker build succeeds (docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § projects, project_collaborators, chat_messages, requirements_document_drafts, requirements_document_versions, review_assignments, review_timeline_entries, collaboration_invitations — table rename and FK renames
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § Service Decomposition, Django Model Sharing — app rename in core and gateway
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § gRPC Communication — proto changes and regeneration
Testing: No specific test matrix entries for this scaffolding story — implement-first workflow
Files: services/core/apps/ideas/ (rename to projects/), services/gateway/apps/ideas/ (rename to projects/), services/core/apps/ideas/models.py, services/gateway/apps/ideas/models.py, services/core/apps/ideas/migrations/, services/gateway/apps/ideas/migrations/, proto/core.proto, proto/common.proto, proto/gateway.proto, proto/ai.proto, proto/pdf.proto, services/core/grpc_server/servicers/, services/gateway/grpc_clients/, services/ai/grpc_clients/, services/notification/grpc_clients/, services/gateway/apps/websocket/consumers.py, services/core/events/, services/gateway/events/, services/notification/consumers/
Gotchas: Django app rename requires updating apps.py AppConfig.name, INSTALLED_APPS in settings.py, and all import paths across the codebase. The 'ideas' app name appears in dozens of imports. Migration files must be created in the NEW app directory path after renaming. WebSocket consumer routing must be updated in gateway/routing.py. RabbitMQ queue names and routing keys in docker-compose.yml may need updates. The project_type column is added but migration should set a temporary default value (e.g., 'software') for existing rows, then M19 will handle proper type assignment.

data_model: ideas → projects: id uuid PK, title varchar(500), title_manually_edited bool, state varchar(20), visibility varchar(20), agent_mode varchar(20), owner_id uuid FK, share_link_token varchar(64) UNIQUE, deleted_at timestamptz, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz. Add: project_type varchar(20) NOT NULL CHECK (project_type IN ('software', 'non_software'))
idea_collaborators → project_collaborators: id uuid PK, idea → project FK, user_id uuid FK, joined_at timestamptz
chat_messages: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
requirements_document_drafts: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
requirements_document_versions: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
review_assignments: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
review_timeline_entries: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
collaboration_invitations: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
chat_context_summaries: rename idea_id → project_id (FK to projects)
existing_code: services/core/apps/ideas/models.py: class Idea(models.Model), class IdeaCollaborator(models.Model)
services/gateway/apps/ideas/models.py: class Idea(models.Model), class IdeaCollaborator(models.Model) — mirror models
services/gateway/apps/websocket/consumers.py: class IdeaConsumer(AsyncWebsocketConsumer)
proto/core.proto: message Idea, message IdeaCollaborator, RPC methods with idea_id parameters
services/core/events/: event types 'idea.created', 'idea.updated', 'idea.deleted'
.ralph/archive/m17-remove-features/progress.txt: patterns on Django migration, app rename, proto regeneration

userStories.title: [Backend] Rename API routes from /api/ideas to /api/projects
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all REST API endpoints renamed from '/api/ideas/' to '/api/projects/' and URL parameters from 'idea_id' to 'project_id' so that the API reflects the new product terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: services/gateway/apps/projects/urls.py: All URL patterns changed from 'ideas/' to 'projects/'
All URL parameter names changed from '<uuid:idea_id>' to '<uuid:project_id>'
services/gateway/apps/projects/views.py: All view function parameters renamed from 'idea_id' to 'project_id'
services/gateway/apps/chat/views.py: URL patterns and view parameters updated
services/gateway/apps/brd/views.py: URL patterns and view parameters updated
services/gateway/apps/review/views.py: URL patterns and view parameters updated
services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py: URL patterns and view parameters updated
services/gateway/apps/comments/views.py: URL parameters updated
All error messages and response text updated from 'idea' to 'project'
All serializer field names remain compatible (e.g., JSON responses use 'id' not 'project_id' for the project's own ID)
WebSocket routing updated if it references /ws/ideas/ paths
All test files updated to use new URL patterns
Typecheck passes (mypy services/)
Ruff check passes (ruff check services/)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § REST Endpoints — all /api/ideas/* endpoints become /api/projects/*
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § Gateway Service — URL routing structure
Testing: No specific test matrix entries for this scaffolding story — implement-first workflow
Files: services/gateway/apps/projects/urls.py (was ideas/urls.py), services/gateway/apps/projects/views.py, services/gateway/apps/chat/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/chat/views.py, services/gateway/apps/brd/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/brd/views.py, services/gateway/apps/review/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/review/views.py, services/gateway/apps/collaboration/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/collaboration/views.py, services/gateway/apps/comments/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/comments/views.py, services/gateway/apps/websocket/routing.py, services/gateway/apps/projects/tests/
Gotchas: Django URL patterns must match exactly — forgotten renames will cause 404s. View function parameter names must match URL pattern parameter names. Serializers may have 'idea' field names that need renaming but be careful not to break the JSON schema that frontend expects. Test files mock URL paths — all need updates. WebSocket consumers may have URL routing that references 'ideas' in the path pattern.

existing_code: services/gateway/apps/ideas/urls.py: urlpatterns with path('ideas/', ...) and path('<uuid:idea_id>/', ...)
services/gateway/apps/ideas/views.py: def view_function(request, idea_id: uuid.UUID)
services/gateway/apps/websocket/routing.py: websocket_urlpatterns with 'ws/ideas/<uuid:idea_id>/'

userStories.title: [Frontend] Rename all idea references to project
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all frontend files, types, components, hooks, and routing renamed from 'idea' to 'project' so that the frontend codebase reflects the new product terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/api/ideas.ts renamed to projects.ts, all functions renamed (createIdea -> createProject, etc.)
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Idea interface renamed to Project, IdeaCollaborator renamed to ProjectCollaborator
frontend/src/pages/IdeaWorkspace/ renamed to ProjectWorkspace/
frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCard.tsx renamed to ProjectCard.tsx
frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCardSkeleton.tsx renamed to ProjectCardSkeleton.tsx
frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCardCompact.tsx renamed to ProjectCardCompact.tsx
frontend/src/components/layout/IdeasListFloating.tsx renamed to ProjectsListFloating.tsx
frontend/src/features/admin/IdeasTab.tsx renamed to ProjectsTab.tsx
All idea-related hooks renamed: use-create-idea.ts -> use-create-project.ts, use-landing-sync.ts updated
frontend/src/app/routes.tsx: /idea/:id -> /project/:id
All API client calls updated to use /api/projects/ endpoints
All React Query keys updated: ['ideas', ...] -> ['projects', ...]
Redux slices updated if they reference 'idea' state
WebSocket event handlers updated: 'idea_created' -> 'project_created', etc.
All component props renamed: ideaId -> projectId, idea -> project
All state variables renamed: idea -> project, ideas -> projects
All function names renamed: handleIdeaClick -> handleProjectClick, etc.
All test files updated to use Project instead of Idea
All test mocks updated to use new API paths and field names
TypeScript typecheck passes (cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit)
ESLint passes (cd frontend && npx eslint src/)
Docker build succeeds (docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build)
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/component-specs.md § Project Card — component rename from IdeaCard to ProjectCard
Design: docs/03-design/page-layouts.md § Landing Page — references to idea cards become project cards
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § Frontend Structure — file path conventions
Testing: No specific test matrix entries for this scaffolding story — implement-first workflow
Files: frontend/src/api/ideas.ts (rename to projects.ts), frontend/src/types/models.ts, frontend/src/pages/IdeaWorkspace/ (rename to ProjectWorkspace/), frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCard.tsx (rename to ProjectCard.tsx), frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCardSkeleton.tsx, frontend/src/components/landing/IdeaCardCompact.tsx, frontend/src/components/layout/IdeasListFloating.tsx, frontend/src/features/admin/IdeasTab.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/use-create-idea.ts, frontend/src/hooks/use-landing-sync.ts, frontend/src/hooks/use-websocket.ts, frontend/src/app/routes.tsx, frontend/src/store/, frontend/src/__tests__/
Gotchas: File renames in React require updating all imports across the codebase — use IDE refactor or grep to find all import paths. Type renames cascade to all type annotations throughout the frontend. WebSocket event names must match the backend's new event names exactly. React Query keys must be updated consistently or cache will break. Component prop renames require updating all usage sites. The word 'idea' appears in many contexts (e.g., 'good idea', 'no idea') in comments and strings — only rename actual code references, not natural language. Some test files mock API responses — all 'idea' field names in mocks must become 'project'.

components: IdeaCard → ProjectCard — props: idea → project, onIdeaClick → onProjectClick
IdeaWorkspace → ProjectWorkspace — route param: ideaId → projectId
IdeasListFloating → ProjectsListFloating — internal state: ideas → projects
api_endpoints: All endpoints from ideas.ts API client updated to /api/projects/*
existing_code: frontend/src/api/ideas.ts: export const createIdea, fetchIdea, updateIdea, deleteIdea, restoreIdea
frontend/src/types/models.ts: export interface Idea { id: string; title: string; ... }
frontend/src/hooks/use-create-idea.ts: export const useCreateIdea hook
frontend/src/app/routes.tsx: <Route path='/idea/:id' element={<IdeaWorkspace />} />

userStories.title: [Both] Rename terminology and translations from brainstorming to requirements assembly
userStories.description: As a user, I want all user-facing text updated from 'idea'/'brainstorming' language to 'project'/'requirements assembly' language so that the product terminology matches the new purpose as a requirements assembly platform.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json: All 'idea' strings replaced with 'project' (nav.ideas -> nav.projects, landing.lists.myIdeas -> myProjects, etc.)
frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json: All 'idea' strings replaced with 'project' equivalent in German (Idee -> Projekt)
Process step labels updated in translations: 'Brainstorm' -> 'Define', 'Document' -> 'Structure', 'Review' stays same
Landing page hero text updated: 'Start a new brainstorm' -> 'Create a new project', 'Describe your idea' -> 'Describe your project'
All navigation labels updated: 'Ideas' -> 'Projects'
All button labels updated: 'Create Idea' -> 'Create Project', 'Delete Idea' -> 'Delete Project', etc.
All empty state messages updated: 'Start your first brainstorm' -> 'Create your first project'
All notification messages updated: 'idea' -> 'project'
services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py: System prompt updated to use 'project' and 'requirements' language instead of 'idea' and 'brainstorming'
services/ai/agents/summarizing_ai/prompt.py: System prompt updated to use 'project' language
services/ai/processing/pipeline.py: Any hardcoded messages updated to use 'project' language
All email templates updated: 'idea' -> 'project'
All notification templates updated: 'idea' -> 'project'
grep -r 'idea\|Idea\|brainstorm' frontend/src/i18n/ returns only intentional hits (e.g., 'good idea' in comments)
grep -r 'brainstorm\|Brainstorm' services/ai/ returns no hits in production code (comments OK)
TypeScript typecheck passes
Docker build succeeds
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/01-requirements/features.md § FA-1 Project Workspace — process step terminology
AI: docs/03-ai/system-prompts.md § Facilitator — full system prompt with 'idea' and 'brainstorming' language to update
AI: docs/03-ai/system-prompts.md § Summarizing AI — system prompt with 'idea' language to update
Testing: No specific test matrix entries for this scaffolding story — implement-first workflow
Files: frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json, frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json, services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py, services/ai/agents/summarizing_ai/prompt.py, services/ai/processing/pipeline.py, services/notification/templates/, services/gateway/apps/notifications/
Gotchas: The word 'idea' appears in many natural language contexts ('good idea', 'no idea', 'ideally') — do NOT replace these. Only replace user-facing product terminology. The AI prompts have significant 'brainstorming' and 'idea refinement' language that needs careful rewording to 'requirements structuring' and 'project definition' while preserving the prompt's functionality and tone. German translations must be grammatically correct (Idee -> Projekt, but check plurals and cases). Translation keys themselves may need renaming (e.g., 'landing.hero.ideaPlaceholder' -> 'landing.hero.projectPlaceholder') but be careful not to break existing references before the key is renamed everywhere. Process steps appear in multiple places: stepper component, translations, AI prompts — must be consistent everywhere.

ai_specs: Facilitator prompt.py — replace 'brainstorming', 'refine your idea', 'idea development' with 'requirements assembly', 'structure your project', 'requirements definition'. Preserve agent mode logic, delegation logic, tone guidance.
Summarizing AI prompt.py — replace 'idea' references with 'project', ensure summary focuses on requirements content not brainstorm process

frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json: 'nav.ideas': 'Ideen', 'landing.hero.heading': 'Neue Idee brainstormen', etc. — 17 'idea' hits total
services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py: 'You are the Brainstorming Assistant...', 'help them refine their ideas...', 'brainstorming session...' — multiple hits
